title: Fix SinglePlayerPage Layout Spacing and Padding
description: Optimize SinglePlayerPage layout to use design system spacing variables. Replace excessive top padding (pt-48) with organized, consistent spacing that properly accommodates the fixed header.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace pt-48 with calculated header height + design system spacing
Use CSS variables for all spacing values
No overlap between fixed header and main content
Consistent gap between left (flat boards) and right (3D view) panels
Responsive padding that works on all screen sizes
Smooth scrolling in flat boards panel
No layout shifts when game state changes
Back button, title, and game info remain properly positioned in fixed header
technicalNotes: Calculate actual header height instead of using arbitrary pt-48
Consider using calc() with CSS variables for header offset
Test with different game states to ensure consistent spacing
Verify overflow behavior in both panels
Ensure 3D canvas doesn't get cut off
testingStrategy: Visual tests on multiple viewport sizes. Test scrolling behavior. Verify header remains fixed during scroll. Test with all game states.
rollbackPlan: Revert to pt-48 if calculated spacing causes layout issues
